signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 inflation rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 inflation rises to 2.16% YoY | NO** | **MED** confidence

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February 2026, with monthly inflation at 0.34%.[2] This newly reported figure, covering data through early 2026, shows a modest uptick after 2025's annual average of 2.13% and amid 2024's full-year rate of around 2.3%.[1][2][3] No resol
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
